ddls:
CREATE TABLE "firms" (
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firm */,
  "firm_name" TEXT /* Name of the firm */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the firm */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the firm was established */,
  "firm_type" TEXT /* Type of firm (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the firm */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_data" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production data entry */,
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the firm that the data belongs to */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year the data was collected */,
  "production" REAL /* Production value for the firm in that year */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of land used by the firm in that year */,
  "labor" INTEGER /* Labor employed by the firm in that year */,
  "fertilizer" REAL /* Fertilizer used by the firm in that year */,
  "production_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of production */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, satellite imagery) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_production_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_type_id") REFERENCES production_types ("production_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_firm_id FOREIGN KEY ("firm_id") REFERENCES firms ("firm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_types" (
  "production_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production type */,
  "production_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the production type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the production type (e.g., tons, kilograms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the production data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the production data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES production_data ("production_id")
)
